name: BreadcrumbItem
description: One link in a breadcrumb trail with its leading separator. API mirrors industry convention (Astryx BreadcrumbItem); the first item is authored with hasSeparator off (positional part logic is a documented gap), and aria-current needs conditional attributes — also documented.

props.name: hasSeparator
props.description: Leading separator — off for the first item in a trail.

props.name: href
props.description: Navigation target. Current-page items conventionally point at themselves.
